description: Add the missing `group` property to ToolDefinition documentation in the SDK reference and plugin development guide.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add group property to ToolDefinition in SDK tools reference
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the SDK tools reference to document the `group` property so that I can discover and use tool grouping in the side panel.
acceptanceCriteria: The `ToolDefinition` interface code block in `docs/content/docs/sdk/tools.mdx` includes `group?: string;` between `icon` and `input`

The Properties table includes a row for `group` with type `string` (optional), describing it as an optional group name for visual grouping in the side panel where tools with the same group render together under a section header
userStories.notes:
File: `docs/content/docs/sdk/tools.mdx`

The `ToolDefinition` interface code block (around line 30) is missing the `group` property. The actual SDK source at `platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts` line 49-50 has:

```typescript
/** Optional group name for visual grouping in the side panel. Tools with the same group are rendered together under a section header. */
group?: string;
```

Add it between `icon` and `input` in the interface block. Also add a row to the Properties table (around line 54-91) for `group` following the same format as other optional properties like `icon`.

userStories.title: Add group property to defineTool example in plugin development guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the plugin development guide to show the `group` property in tool definition examples so that I understand how to use tool grouping.
acceptanceCriteria: The `defineTool` example in `docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx` includes `group` as an optional property with a brief inline comment or the tool naming conventions section mentions `group`
userStories.notes:
File: `docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx`

The `defineTool` example (around lines 155-191) shows `name`, `displayName`, `description`, `icon`, `input`, `output`, `handle` but omits `group`. The tool naming conventions section (around lines 193-198) explains `name`, `displayName`, `description`, and `icon` but makes no mention of `group`.

Add `group` to the naming conventions section with a brief explanation like: `group` — optional group name for visual grouping in the side panel; tools with the same group render together under a section header.

Optionally add `group: 'Items',` to the `defineTool` example to illustrate usage. Keep it minimal — this is a guide, not a reference page.
